meta.summary: PGGB 0.7.4 pangenome graph builder runtime with the upstream pggb pipeline and bundled graph construction, normalization, visualization, and variant-calling dependencies.
meta.description: PGGB 0.7.4 pangenome graph builder runtime with the upstream pggb pipeline and bundled graph construction, normalization, visualization, and variant-calling dependencies.

test: { pggb --version 2>&1 || true; } | grep -Fx 'pggb v0.7.4-0-ge25486b' >/dev/null && pggb --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Use wfmash, seqwish, smoothxg, odgi, gfaffix, and vg' >/dev/null

wfmash --version 2>&1 | grep -E '^[0-9a-f]{7,}$' >/dev/null && seqwish --version 2>&1 | grep -E '^v[0-9]' >/dev/null && smoothxg --version 2>&1 | grep -E '^v[0-9]' >/dev/null && odgi version -v 2>&1 | grep -E '^v[0-9]' >/dev/null && gfaffix --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'impg 0.4.1' >/dev/null

vg version 2>&1 | grep -F 'vg version' >/dev/null && vcfbub --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'vcfbub' >/dev/null && vcfwave --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'vcfwave' >/dev/null && bcftools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'bcftools 1.19' >/dev/null && samtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'samtools 1.16' >/dev/null

multiqc --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'multiqc, version' >/dev/null && Rscript --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'Rscript' >/dev/null && python3 --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'Python' >/dev/null && rtg version 2>&1 | grep -F 'RTG' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-pggb-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; { printf '>sampleA#1#ctg1
'; i=0; while [ "$i" -lt 80 ]; do printf ACGT; i=$((i + 1)); done; printf '
>sampleB#1#ctg1
'; i=0; while [ "$i" -lt 40 ]; do printf ACGT; i=$((i + 1)); done; printf TTGT; i=0; while [ "$i" -lt 39 ]; do printf ACGT; i=$((i + 1)); done; printf '
'; } > tiny.fa; samtools faidx tiny.fa; pggb -i tiny.fa -o out -n 2 -t 1 -T 1 -s 100 -l 100 -p 70 -k 5 -G 100 -X -v > stdout.log 2> stderr.log; find out -type f -name '*.final.gfa' -print -quit | grep -F '.final.gfa' >/dev/null; find out -type f -name '*.final.og' -print -quit | grep -F '.final.og' >/dev/null; grep -R 'version:            v0.7.4-0-ge25486b' out >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: pggb
upstream.citation: Garrison et al. 2024, Building pangenome graphs, Nature Methods
